title: Government Information Services * Environmental Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Government Information Services * Environmental Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Environmental Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION CLIMATE CHANGE AND HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works with partner agencies to study, prevent and plan for the health effects of climate change. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 673-0482 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AGENCY UNITED STATES ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AGENCY REGION 10 ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AGENCY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Protects individuals from significant risks to human health and the environment through the following core services: -Provides information on what individuals can do in their homes, workplaces, and communities to prevent pollution -Conducts research on environmental issues -Develops and enforcing environmental regulations -Provides information on and working to address pollution of air and water by heavy metals and other hazardous materials -Allocates grants to state environmental programs, nonprofits, educational institutions, etc., addressing environmental issues 1200 6th Avenue Seattle, WA 98101 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-4:30pm Email (206) 553-1200 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION CLIMATE CHANGE AND HEALTH
